reason: An optional emoji on a tile instead of the file icon is a functional addition, not a redesign. The diff adds an Emoji field to TargetItem, one branch in the existing MakeBubble that draws a TextBlock with the emoji in place of the icon Image (same size and position), and a small Emoji text box in the target editor. Wheel geometry, colours, animations and layout are untouched — the emoji sits exactly where the icon did. No new screen or visual language was introduced, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
